coverage_note: Every entry is layer:infra. This repo is a Claude Code plugin with no UI/HTTP surface; Playwright user-flow and dev-API integration criteria are N/A per the recorded authorization below. Phase 1's loop conditions accept this in lieu of those criteria.
mock_testing_authorized: no UI/HTTP surface; verification = pytest both encodings + real-subprocess CLI execution + openspec strict validation

entries.source_excerpt: acquire_lock sweep->scan->write_text race: create the lock file with os.open(O_CREAT|O_EXCL|O_WRONLY) so an existing file fails acquisition surfacing the holder; stale reclaim via atomic os.replace of an EXCL temp.
scenarios: identical-scope acquisition cannot silently overwrite (R5a)
acceptance_criteria: the lock file is created with os.open(O_CREAT|O_EXCL|O_WRONLY); a second identical-scope acquire fails surfacing the holder (no silent overwrite)
a stale lock is reclaimed via atomic os.replace of a freshly-EXCL temp

entries.source_excerpt: Intersecting-scope race: after a successful EXCL write, re-scan; if another live lock with an intersecting scope and earlier (acquired_at, session-id) exists, release own + return acquisition-failed naming the winner; document advisory boundary.
scenarios: intersecting-scope acquisition resolves to one winner (R5b)
acceptance_criteria: after EXCL write, a re-scan finds an intersecting earlier lock -> release own + return acquisition-failed naming the winner
the advisory-semantics boundary documented in the module docstring

acceptance_criteria.statement: Marker/helper consolidation + false-positive fixes (REQ-R1, REQ-R7): R1a one definition each via shared_util dual-form with preserved fail-open/closed; R1b localhost union; R1c CPC discipline-family section; R1d override proximity (benign no-fire, v3.0.0 fixture fires); R1e admission pruning; R7 discipline-detector applicability guards + {applied,not_applicable,reason} + this repo records both n/a.

The hooks/vao/ package split is behavior-preserving (REQ-R2): 11 modules <=900 lines, vao_tools.py <=400-line facade re-exporting all 41 test-referenced names (identity round-trip), ZERO test edits attributable to R2, glue-execution + every Layer 3 CLI byte-identical.

The narrative diet loses no operative rule (REQ-R3): CLAUDE.md <=350 operative-first with facts relocated to CHANGELOG first; CPC >=30% line reduction zero rule loss; pipeline bodies collapsed to CPC references + inline abort stub; every edited test narrative-pinning + enumerated; counts still true; before/after measured.

Agent hygiene + locks fixes + new capabilities (REQ-R4/R5/R6): zero LS/NotebookRead + allowlists updated + Write granted + boilerplate re-synced + colors mapped + scaffold-agent documented; O_CREAT|O_EXCL lock + intersecting re-scan + globs_intersect prefix/suffix (src/** vs **/auth.py True) + threaded one-winner; security-hunter shape + security-finding + fork reconciliation; a11y axis + a11y-gap; heartbeat event + snapshot + CPC discipline.

Full suite green under both encodings + docs current + version bumped (run-level): python -m pytest green under cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1 (final counts reported, additive); openspec validate --all --strict green (2 pre-existing changes stay green); 3.10.0 in plugin.json+marketplace.json; CHANGELOG + CLAUDE.md(post-R3a) + README + CODEBASE_MAP + INTEGRATION_MAP reflect hooks/vao/ + new vocabulary + new capabilities + new counts; every edited test enumerated.

unit_test_targets.assertion: missing_ok=True returns default; missing_ok=False raises; per-call-site fail-open/closed preserved
all 41 names (20 verify_ + 18 _CONST + 3 _helper) importable as vao_tools.<name>; each is hooks/vao/<module>.<name>
benign roadmap sentence no-fire; v3.0.0 fixture fires; <=500-char proximity for single pair; >=2 admissions for doc-wide
prod-safe counts only Playwright/QA-shaped; multi-persona n/a with no frontend markers; schema has {applied,not_applicable,reason}
N threads same scope -> exactly one winner; identical-scope second acquire fails surfacing holder; intersecting earlier wins; stale-reclaim works
heartbeat in EVENT_TYPES; offline/no-config silent no-op exit 0
returns {run-id, phase, elapsed, qa_cycle_count, agents_dispatched} from metrics+intake-state
round-trips; security-finding in the SR catalog

integration_test_targets.assertion: every commands/*.md + hooks.json invocation resolves/exists/runs without traceback or silent no-op AFTER the R2 split (proves facade CLI byte-identical)
same argparse, exit codes, verdict files as pre-split (frozen external contract)
valid:true for review-improvements; consolidate-duplicated-rules + exploration-pipeline stay green
green once under default Windows cp1252 and once under PYTHONUTF8=1; final counts reported (grow from 4097)

out_of_scope: No live web testing, browser automation, or dev-server interaction -- this plugin has no web surface (the R6b a11y axis + R7 prod-safe guard are themselves n/a for this repo's no-UI shape).
No production system, deployed URL, or external service -- none exist.
No destructive git operations (stash / reset --hard / rebase / commit --amend / checkout other branch / clean -f).
No structural-test edit except where it pins text this run deliberately changes (narrative / stale tool vocabulary / boilerplate) -- each enumerated with reason; R2 must produce ZERO test edits.
Do not touch the consolidate-duplicated-rules or exploration-pipeline active OpenSpec changes.
No new/changed runtime third-party dependency -- Python stays stdlib-only.
